title: Scythes Vanilla
description: Adds vanilla-style scythes with area damage, extended reach, and a unique life-steal enchantment. A perfect balance between swords and axes.
body:
### 🗡️ Scythe Vanilla Mod
Scythe Vanilla Mod introduces a brand-new weapon type: Scythes, designed to fit seamlessly into Minecraft’s vanilla style while keeping gameplay balanced and intuitive. 

### ⚔️ Content
The mod adds multiple scythe variants based on classic Minecraft materials:
- Wooden Scythe
- Stone Scythe
- Iron Scythe
- Golden Scythe
- Diamond Scythe
- Netherite Scythe

### ⚙️ Functionality
Scythes are designed as a middle ground between swords and axes, offering a unique combat experience:
- ⏱️ Attack Speed:
- Slower than swords, but faster than axes.
- 💥 Damage: Higher than swords, but lower than axes.
- 🌪️ Area Damage (AoE): All scythes have built-in area damage, which scales with the material tier.
- 📏 Extended Reach: Allows hitting and interacting with entities from a slightly greater distance.
- This makes scythes a strong strategic choice, especially for fighting groups of enemies.

### ✨ Exclusive Enchantment
🩸 Soul Devourer (Level I - III)

A unique enchantment exclusive to scythes:

Killing mobs or players restores health. The amount healed depends on the enchantment level: Level I → 1 heart (Scales with each level)

_📌 Important: This enchantment can only be obtained through the enchanting table._
 
### 🔨 Crafting
Scythes follow a crafting system that stays consistent with vanilla Minecraft design. 
![crafteo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d71990a3e452975bc2a6fe29ed8284dbcc515e6.png)

### 🌐 Languages
The mod includes language support for:
- Spanish (es_es)
- English (en_us)
